scripts.dev: npm run up && wait-on tcp:5432 && concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.dev:offline: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:backend:local" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.verify: npm run verify:backend && npm run verify:frontend
scripts.verify:integration: npm run up && wait-on tcp:5432 && npm run verify
